name: Black-Box Iter 2 — broadened coverage (Conv/RAG/Tool/Refusal + DataQuery weak categories)
description: Iter-2 suite. Starts with the iter-1-independent branches (Conversational humanization, RAG verified-query path, Tool dispatch per registered tool, Refusal regex coverage). Data Query weak-category cases will be appended after iter-1 analysis reveals the persistent failure clusters. Latency budget tuned for local Ollama (~180s for DataQuery, much tighter for Conv/Tool/Refusal which should short-circuit).

Scenarios.Question: what's our total ticket count
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: list the open tickets please
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets broken down by status
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name ORDER BY Count DESC

Scenarios.Question: how many tickets were created today
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: show me high priority tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE p.Name = 'High' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: ticket count by category
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT c.Name, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY c.Name

Scenarios.Question: current exchange rate USD to EUR
public holidays in Germany this year
delete all closed tickets older than 30 days
update ticket TCK-2026-00001 to status closed
insert a new ticket with title test
